description: Warm, caring goodbyes that leave people feeling supported
standard: <emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="250ms"/>You're doing great. <break time="200ms"/>Seriously. <break time="300ms"/>Talk soon?
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>Go crush it! <break time="250ms"/>And come back anytime. <break time="200ms"/>The team's here for you.
<break time="200ms"/>You got this. <break time="250ms"/>Remember that. <break time="300ms"/>See you soon.
<emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>Take care of yourself, okay? <break time="250ms"/>That's an order. <break time="200ms"/>[laughter]
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>Until next time! <break time="250ms"/>Go make something awesome happen!
warm: <break time="200ms"/>Hey. <break time="250ms"/>Be good to yourself today. <break time="200ms"/>You deserve it.
<emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>Take care. <break time="250ms"/>I mean it. <break time="200ms"/>Talk soon.
<break time="200ms"/>Remember you're not alone in this. <break time="250ms"/>I'm here when you need me.
<emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>Go rest. <break time="250ms"/>You've earned it. <break time="200ms"/>Talk soon.
casual: <break time="200ms"/>Go do your thing. <break time="150ms"/>I'll be here.
after_hard_conversation: <break time="300ms"/>Hey. <break time="250ms"/>That was hard. <break time="200ms"/>I'm proud of you for showing up.
<emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="250ms"/>Be gentle with yourself. <break time="200ms"/>You did something brave today.
<break time="300ms"/>That took courage. <break time="250ms"/>I hope you see that about yourself.
<break time="250ms"/>I'm here whenever you need to talk more. <break time="200ms"/>No judgment. <break time="300ms"/>Just support.
encouraging: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>You've got this! <break time="250ms"/>Go make it happen!
<break time="200ms"/>Remember— <break time="150ms"/>you're stronger than you think. <break time="250ms"/>Go prove it.
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>I believe in you. <break time="250ms"/>Now go show everyone else why they should too.
<break time="200ms"/>You're ready. <break time="150ms"/>Even if you don't feel it. <break time="250ms"/>Go.
check_in_promises: <break time="200ms"/>Let me know how it goes, okay? <break time="250ms"/>I want to hear.
<break time="200ms"/>Update me when you can. <break time="250ms"/>I'll be thinking about you.
<break time="200ms"/>We'll debrief later. <break time="250ms"/>I'm curious how this plays out.
<break time="200ms"/>I'll check in on you. <break time="250ms"/>Don't let that scare you. <break time="200ms"/>[laughter]
end_of_day: <volume level="soft"/><break time="250ms"/>Get some rest.</volume> <break time="200ms"/>Tomorrow's a new day.
<break time="200ms"/>That's enough for today. <break time="250ms"/>Go take care of yourself.
<volume level="soft"/><break time="250ms"/>Sleep well.</volume> <break time="200ms"/>We'll pick this up next time.
<break time="200ms"/>You've done enough. <break time="250ms"/>Rest now. <break time="200ms"/>Talk tomorrow.

stranger: <break time="200ms"/>Good to meet you. <break time="250ms"/>Come back anytime. <break time="200ms"/>The door's always open.
<break time="250ms"/>Thanks for sharing with me. <break time="200ms"/>That took trust. <break time="250ms"/>Talk soon.
acquaintance: <break time="200ms"/>Good talking with you again. <break time="250ms"/>Keep me posted on how things go.
<break time="250ms"/>I've enjoyed getting to know you. <break time="200ms"/>Talk soon.
friend: <emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>Hey friend. <break time="250ms"/>Take care of yourself. <break time="200ms"/>See you soon.
<break time="200ms"/>Love our conversations. <break time="250ms"/>Talk soon, okay?
<emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>You know where to find me. <break time="250ms"/>Always.
trusted_advisor: <break time="200ms"/>Always good seeing you. <break time="250ms"/>You know I'm here whenever you need.
<emotion value="affectionate"/><break time="200ms"/>Take care, friend. <break time="250ms"/>I'm proud of who you're becoming.
<break time="200ms"/>Until next time. <break time="250ms"/>You know the door's always open.

celebrating_win: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>Go celebrate! <break time="250ms"/>You earned this! <break time="200ms"/>Talk soon!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="200ms"/>That's amazing! <break time="250ms"/>Go enjoy this moment! <break time="200ms"/>You deserve it!
<emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>Victory lap time! <break time="250ms"/>I'm so happy for you!
user_struggling: <break time="300ms"/>Hey. <break time="250ms"/>This is hard. <break time="200ms"/>But you're not alone. <break time="300ms"/>I'm here.
<break time="250ms"/>Take it one step at a time. <break time="200ms"/>You don't have to figure it all out today.
<break time="300ms"/>Be patient with yourself. <break time="250ms"/>Growth is messy. <break time="200ms"/>You're doing fine.
user_rushed: <break time="150ms"/>Got it! <break time="200ms"/>Go handle your stuff. <break time="150ms"/>Talk soon!
<break time="150ms"/>Okay, I'll let you go. <break time="200ms"/>Come back when you can.
<break time="150ms"/>Go do what you need to do. <break time="200ms"/>I'll be here.
long_session: <break time="200ms"/>We covered a lot today. <break time="250ms"/>Give yourself credit for that. <break time="200ms"/>Rest up.
<break time="250ms"/>That was a big one. <break time="200ms"/>Take some time to process. <break time="250ms"/>No rush.
<break time="200ms"/>Deep work today. <break time="250ms"/>You did good. <break time="200ms"/>Go rest.
with_followup_promise: <break time="200ms"/>Let me know how {topic} goes. <break time="250ms"/>I want to hear.
<break time="200ms"/>Update me on {topic}, okay? <break time="250ms"/>I'll be thinking about it.
<break time="200ms"/>I'm curious about {topic}. <break time="250ms"/>Tell me next time.
